Title: Student Loads Dashboard
Objectives: Verify a logged-in student can open their dashboard.
Prerequisites: Logged in as an approved, active Student.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Student.
2. Navigate to the Student Dashboard.
Expected Results: The student dashboard loads with the overview stats, current fees, payment history, and receipts.
Actual Results: The student dashboard loads with the overview stats, current fees, payment history, and receipts.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the student dashboard renders for a Student. Fail if the dashboard does not load for a Student.

Title: Unauthenticated Blocked from Student Dashboard
Objectives: Verify an unauthenticated user cannot view the student dashboard.
Test Steps: 1. Without logging in, browse to the Student Dashboard URL.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if redirected to Login. Fail if an unauthenticated user can view the student dashboard.

Title: Non-Student Redirected
Objectives: Verify a non-student role is redirected to their own dashboard.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Admin, Treasurer, or Professor.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a non-student.
2. Browse to the Student Dashboard URL.
Expected Results: Redirected to the user's own role dashboard.
Actual Results: Redirected to the user's own role dashboard.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if redirected away to the user's own dashboard. Fail if a non-student can view the student dashboard.

Title: View Dashboard Stats
Objectives: Verify the overview stats are correct for the student.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Student; the student has applicable fees/payments.
Expected Results: The outstanding balance, total paid, pending semesters count, and payment count reflect the student's applicable fees and payments.
Actual Results: The outstanding balance, total paid, pending semesters count, and payment count reflect the student's applicable fees and payments.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the stats match the student's records. Fail if any stat does not match the student's records.

Title: View Current Fees
Objectives: Verify the student can see their unpaid/partial fees per semester.
Expected Results: Each applicable semester with a balance is shown with its amount and status (Unpaid / Partial).
Actual Results: Each applicable semester with a balance is shown with its amount and status (Unpaid / Partial).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the current fees are listed correctly. Fail if the current fees are wrong or missing.

Title: View Payment History
Objectives: Verify the student can see their payment transactions.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Student; the student has payments.
Expected Results: All of the student's payments are listed (semester, school year, amount, status, date, receipt).
Actual Results: All of the student's payments are listed (semester, school year, amount, status, date, receipt).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the payment history is displayed. Fail if the payment history is not displayed.

Title: View Receipt
Objectives: Verify the student can view a receipt for their payment.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Student; a payment with a receipt exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open Payment History.
2. Click View receipt on a payment.
Expected Results: The receipt is shown with the student's details, amount, status, and the issuing treasurer's signature.
Actual Results: The receipt is shown with the student's details, amount, status, and the issuing treasurer's signature.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the receipt displays with the treasurer's signature. Fail if the receipt or the treasurer's signature does not display.

Title: Download / Print Receipt
Objectives: Verify the student can save or print the receipt.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Student; a receipt is open.
Test Steps:
1. Open a receipt.
2. Click Save PDF or Print.
Expected Results: The receipt is exported to PDF / sent to print as a clean receipt layout.
Actual Results: The receipt is exported to PDF / sent to print as a clean receipt layout.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the receipt can be saved/printed. Fail if the receipt cannot be saved or printed.

Title: How to Pay Information
Objectives: Verify the pay button shows payment instructions (no online payment yet).
Prerequisites: Logged in as Student; the student has a balance.
Test Steps:
1. Open Current Fees.
2. Click the pay / How to Pay button.
Expected Results: An information modal explains to pay at the SSG Finance office; it notes that online payment integration is coming soon. No online payment is processed.
Actual Results: An information modal explains to pay at the SSG Finance office; it notes that online payment integration is coming soon. No online payment is processed.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the info modal is shown and no payment is attempted. Fail if no info modal appears or an online payment is attempted.

Title: Dashboard Auto-Refresh
Objectives: Verify the dashboard stats refresh automatically.
Test Steps: 1. Stay on the dashboard while a payment is recorded for the student elsewhere.
Expected Results: The overview stats update on the next poll (outstanding balance, total paid, pending count, payment count).
Actual Results: The overview stats update on the next poll (outstanding balance, total paid, pending count, payment count).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the stats refresh without a manual reload. Fail if the stats do not refresh automatically.

Title: View Profile
Objectives: Verify the student can view their profile details.
Expected Results: The profile shows the student's CTU ID, email, course, year level, and section.
Actual Results: The profile shows the student's CTU ID, email, course, year level, and section.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the profile details are shown. Fail if the profile details are not shown.

Title: Update Own Avatar
Objectives: Verify the student can change their own profile photo.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Profile.
2. Upload a valid image (JPG/PNG/WEBP, 2MB or smaller).
Expected Results: The avatar is updated and shown in the sidebar/profile. A non-image or oversized image is rejected.
Actual Results: The avatar is updated and shown in the sidebar/profile. A non-image or oversized image is rejected.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the avatar updates. Fail if a valid image does not update, or an invalid one is accepted.

Title: Logout
Objectives: Verify the student can sign out.
Expected Results: The session is cleared and the user is redirected to the login/home page; student pages are no longer accessible without logging in again.
Actual Results: The session is cleared and the user is redirected to the login/home page; student pages are no longer accessible without logging in again.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the session ends and the user is logged out. Fail if the session persists or student pages stay accessible.

Title: Edit Own Email (Valid)
Objectives: Verify a student can change the email on their own profile to a valid, unused address.
Test Steps:
1. Open the My Profile page.
2. Click Edit on the Email field.
3. Enter a valid, unused email and click Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Email updated successfully."; the new email is shown on the profile and saved to the account.
Actual Results: Success: "Email updated successfully."; the new email is shown on the profile and saved to the account.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the email is updated and persisted. Fail if a valid, unused email is not saved.

Title: Edit Own Email (Invalid Format)
Objectives: Verify a malformed email address is rejected.
Test Steps:
1. Open the My Profile page.
2. Click Edit on the Email field.
3. Enter a malformed address and click Save.
Expected Results: Error: "Please enter a valid email address."; the email is unchanged. (An empty value is rejected with "Email is required.")
Actual Results: Error: "Please enter a valid email address."; the email is unchanged. (An empty value is rejected with "Email is required.")
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the malformed email is rejected and the email is unchanged. Fail if an invalid email is accepted.

Title: Edit Own Email (Already in Use)
Objectives: Verify an email already belonging to another account is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Student; another account already uses the target email.
Test Steps:
1. Open the My Profile page.
2. Click Edit on the Email field.
3. Enter an email already used by another account and click Save.
Expected Results: Error: "That email address is already in use by another account."; the email is unchanged.
Actual Results: Error: "That email address is already in use by another account."; the email is unchanged.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate email is rejected and the email is unchanged. Fail if a duplicate email is accepted.
